description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal dumpster with a dark green body and a black, ribbed plastic lid. The lid is hinged at the back, allowing it to be lifted from the front for easy access to the interior. The dumpster sits on four small caster wheels, making it movable despite its substantial size and weight. Reinforced metal bars are present on the sides for structural support, and there are no visible warning labels or signage. The surface of the dumpster is matte with some subtle wear and grime, typical of outdoor waste containers. Its robust construction and utilitarian design make it suitable for heavy-duty waste management in urban environments.
description: A large green metal dumpster with a black ribbed hinged lid and caster wheels, designed for outdoor waste collection. The surface is matte and slightly worn, with reinforced side bars and no visible labels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main access side with the black ribbed lid and the reinforced green metal body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sloped, hinged lid and the side reinforcement bars.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat green metal panel and the back edge of the lid, with no handles or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the sloped lid and side reinforcements.
attribute_lid_type: hinged, single-section, ribbed plastic lid with no visible locking mechanism
